---
title: "LogiciansтАЩ miscellany"
page-layout: article
format:
  html:
    include-before-body: _lfl-nav.html
---

**Help for generating truth-tables**

Of the available resources, this has been recommended:

- [Truth Table Generator](http://mrieppel.net/prog/truthtable.html) (Michael Rieppel) is a webpage containing a JavaScript program which generates full truth-tables for one or more wffs, and also the LaTeX code for them.

**Laying out theorems, lemmas etc., and marking succeeding proofs:**

- [amsthm.sty](http://www.ctan.org/pkg/amsthm) (the theorem setup of the AMS document classes amsart, amsbook, etc., in stand-alone package form, which should be in any LaTeX distribution) defines environments which are much more configurable than the basic LaTeX 'theorem' environment. There's┬а[a description here](http://anorien.csc.warwick.ac.uk/mirrors/CTAN/macros/latex/required/amscls/doc/amsthdoc.pdf).

- [ntheorem.sty](http://www.ctan.org/pkg/ntheorem) (Wolfgang May and Andreas Schedler) is another, even more flexible, package.

- The [thmtools bundle](https://ctan.org/pkg/thmtools) (Ulrich M. Schwarz 2010, Yukai Chou 2023)) contains a number of useful packages, in particular thm-restate.sty which allows you to label a theorem and then restate it later (with the same number).

- If you just need a correctly-placed end-of-proof marker, then [QED.sty](http://www.ctan.org/pkg/qed) (Paul Taylor, 1993-2003) supplies right-justified marks.

**Setting algorithms**

- Use┬а[algorithms.sty](http://www.ctan.org/tex-archive/macros/latex/contrib/algorithms/) (Peter Williams, 1996, 2004, Rog├йrio Brito 2005) for laying out algorithms in a standard form).

**Branching ┬аquantifiers**

- The neatest way of setting these is suggested by Colin McClarty: use the pmatrix structure available in amsmath package, illustrated here:┬а[branching quantifiers](/resources/branching.html).

**Back to Frege**

- [begriff.sty](http://www.ctan.org/pkg/begriff) (Josh Parsons, 2003) sets Begriffsschrift-style expressions.

- [frege.sty](https://ctan.org/pkg/frege) (Quirin Pamp, 2012)┬аloosely based on the begriff.sty pack┬нage, and of┬нfers a num┬нber of im┬нprove┬нments.

- [grundgesetze.sty](https://ctan.org/pkg/grundgesetze) (Mar┬нcus Ross┬нberg 2016-21), com┬нmands for type┬нset┬нting Got┬нt┬нlob FregeтАЩs con┬нcept-script in the style of his тАЬGrundge┬нsetze der Arith┬нmetikтАЭ

**Counting**

- For word counting,┬а[TeXcount┬а](https://ctan.org/pkg/texcount)has been recommended (allows you to do things like mark bits of a document to be omitted from the word count).┬а(Einar Andreas R├╕dland, 2008-18)

*Links checked 8 October 2024*
